name: Pickled Pepper-Onion Relish
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Vinegar (5 percent acidity, preferably white distilled)
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 9 half-pints
Procedure:
1. Wash and chop the vegetables.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
3. Bring to a gentle boil and simmer for about 30 minutes, until the mixture thickens and reduces by one-half.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Fill sterile jars with hot relish, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
6. Seal jars tightly.
7. Store in refrigerator and use within one month.
If extended storage is desired, process the jars as follows:
Process according to Table 1 at the appropriate altitude.
Table 1: Recommended processing time for Pickled Pepper-Onion Relish in a boiling-water canner.
Jar Size: Half-pints or Pints
Altitude: 0 - 1,000 ft (5 min), 1,001 - 6,000 ft (10 min), above 6,000 ft (15 min)
